questionHtml: Show that the lower bound you have obtained is not the best possible for the solution to the travelling salesman problem for G.
markschemeHtml:
Eliminating C from G a minimum spanning tree is E → A → B → D       M1

of weight 18     A1

Adding BC to CE(18 + 9 + 7) gives a lower bound of 34 > 33     A1

So 33 not the best lower bound.   AG  N0

[3 marks]
